description: This file defines an Angular component 'NavComponent' responsible for navigation UI, session management, and user authentication status handling within an Angular application. It interacts with AWS Amplify for authentication and uses Angular's router and layout modules.

classes.name: NavComponent
classes.description: Angular component managing navigation bar, user session, and authentication status.

methods.name: ngOnInit
methods.description: Initializes the component, retrieves current user session, and sets up observables for authentication status, username, and company name.

methods.name: logout
methods.description: Performs user sign-out, clears local storage, and navigates to the unauthorized page.
